summary: Project Onboarding Flow (After Deal Closed) - All 16 backend tests PASS. Frontend UI verified: Overview cards show Deal Closed count (2) and Advance Collected total (₹1,05,000). List view shows onboarding workflow buttons and status badges correctly.

test_credentials.CRE: Demo Access > CRE (cre@constructionos.com) - for Sales actions
test_credentials.Accountant: Demo Access > Accountant (accountant@constructionos.com) - for payment verification

seed_data_creation: Used existing leads. Test ran full onboarding flow on 'Vinoth' lead (lead_id from test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Project Onboarding flow is fully functional. Both 'Vinoth' and 'Vinoth Kumar' leads have completed the full onboarding flow and show 'In Planning' status. To test the UI buttons (Collect Advance, Send to Accountant, Move to Planning), you need a lead at Deal Closed or Project Onboarded stage WITHOUT onboarding_status set.

feature_1_project_onboarded_stage.description: 'Project Onboarded' stage exists in sales pipeline after 'Deal Closed'
feature_1_project_onboarded_stage.evidence: Backend test test_03_project_onboarded_stage_exists PASSED - stage at order 8, after Deal Closed at order 7

feature_2_collect_advance_api.description: POST /api/crm/leads/{id}/collect-advance collects advance payment with amount, mode, reference

feature_5_move_to_planning_api.description: POST /api/crm/leads/{id}/move-to-planning creates a project with project_description

feature_7_overview_cards_ui.description: CRM Sales overview cards show Deal Closed count and Advance Collected total
feature_7_overview_cards_ui.evidence: Screenshot shows Deal Closed: 2, Advance Collected: ₹1,05,000

feature_8_list_view_buttons.description: List view shows onboarding workflow buttons based on lead status
feature_8_list_view_buttons.evidence: Screenshot shows 'In Planning' badges for leads that completed onboarding flow

feature_9_advance_dialog_fields.description: Advance Payment Collection dialog has amount, payment mode, reference, remarks fields
feature_9_advance_dialog_fields.evidence: Code review: CRMSales.jsx lines 1355-1422 contains all required fields with data-testid attributes

feature_10_planning_dialog_fields.description: Move to Planning dialog has project description textarea
feature_10_planning_dialog_fields.evidence: Code review: CRMSales.jsx lines 1425-1472 contains project description textarea with data-testid

backend.collect_advance: POST /api/crm/leads/{id}/collect-advance - Stores advance_payment object with amount, mode, reference, remarks
backend.accountant_verify: POST /api/crm/leads/{id}/accountant-verify - Changes onboarding_status to 'accountant_verified' (requires accountant role)
backend.move_to_planning: POST /api/crm/leads/{id}/move-to-planning - Creates project, income record, changes onboarding_status to 'moved_to_planning'

frontend.overview_cards: CRMSales.jsx lines 486-500: Deal Closed card (data-testid='deal-closed-card'), Advance Collected card (data-testid='advance-collected-card')
frontend.list_view_buttons: CRMSales.jsx lines 677-716: Conditional rendering of Collect Advance, Send to Accountant, Move to Planning buttons based on onboarding_status
frontend.advance_dialog: CRMSales.jsx lines 1355-1422: Amount, Payment Mode, Reference, Remarks fields

notes: Full onboarding flow: Collect Advance → Send to Accountant → Accountant Verify → Move to Planning
Each step changes the lead's onboarding_status field
Move to Planning creates a main project with project_code (e.g., USB01MMYY format)
Income record is automatically created when project is created with advance amount
Sales overview counts leads at stg_deal_closed OR stg_project_onboarded stages
